title: Refactor payment processing module
author: bob
diff:
diff --git a/src/payment.py b/src/payment.py
index 3333333..4444444 100644
--- a/src/payment.py
+++ b/src/payment.py
@@ -1,10 +1,25 @@
-API_KEY = "sk_live_abcdef1234567890abcdef1234567890"
+API_KEY = os.environ.get("PAYMENT_API_KEY")
 
 def process_payment(amount, card_number):
-    # TODO: add error handling
-    response = stripe.Charge.create(amount=amount, card=card_number, api_key=API_KEY)
+    try:
+        if amount <= 0:
+            raise ValueError("amount must be positive")
+        response = stripe.Charge.create(
+            amount=amount,
+            source=card_number,
+            api_key=API_KEY,
+        )
+        return response.id
+    except stripe.error.CardError as e:
+        logger.error(f"card error: {e}")
+        return None
+
+def refund(payment_id):
+    return stripe.Refund.create(charge=payment_id, api_key=API_KEY)
diff --git a/config/payment.yaml b/config/payment.yaml
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..5555555
--- /dev/null
+++ b/config/payment.yaml
@@ -0,0 +1,3 @@
+timeout: 30
+retries: 3
+currency: USD
